mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( login_id, password_hash, name, email, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
